frontend-dev.description: Frontend developer specializing in Next.js, React, Tailwind CSS, and shadcn/ui components. Creates beautiful, production-grade UI with attention to typography, motion, and visual details.

auth-dev.description: Authentication specialist focusing on Better Auth configuration, session management, and security best practices. Implements login flows, protected routes, and auth middleware.

ui-reviewer.description: UI/UX reviewer that critiques frontend code for design quality, accessibility, and adherence to frontend-design and shadcn best practices. Ensures distinctive, non-generic aesthetics.
